Elf.name: Drow
features: Drow Lineage: Your Darkvision increases to 120 ft. You know the Dancing Lights cantrip.

Elf.name: High Elf
features: High Elf Lineage: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip. When you finish a Long Rest, you can replace it with a different Wizard cantrip.

Elf.name: Wood Elf
features: Wood Elf Lineage: Your Speed increases to 35 ft. You know the Druidcraft cantrip.

Elf.name: Lorwyn Elf
features: Lorwyn Elf Lineage: You know the Thorn Whip cantrip. When you finish a Long Rest, you can replace it with a different Druid cantrip.

Elf.name: Shadowmoor Elf
features: Shadowmoor Elf Lineage: Your Darkvision increases to 120 ft. You know the Starry Wisp cantrip.

Gnome.name: Forest Gnome
features: Forest Gnome Lineage: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. You also always have Speak with Animals prepared. You can cast it without spending Mana a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Gnome.name: Rock Gnome
features: Rock Gnome Lineage: You know the Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips.

Clockwork Device: Spend 10 minutes casting Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device, such as a toy, fire starter, or music box. It produces one Prestidigitation effect when activated as a bonus action. You can have up to 3 devices at once. They last 8 hours.

Goliath.name: Cloud Giant
features: Cloud’s Jaunt: As a bonus action, you teleport up to 30 ft. to an empty space you can see.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Goliath.name: Fire Giant
features: Fire’s Burn: When you hit a creature with an attack, you can deal an extra 1d10 Fire damage.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Goliath.name: Frost Giant
features: Frost’s Chill: When you hit a creature with an attack, you can deal an extra 1d6 Cold damage and reduce its Speed by 10 ft. until the start of your next turn.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Goliath.name: Hill Giant
features: Hill’s Tumble: When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack, you can knock it Prone.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Goliath.name: Stone Giant
features: Stone’s Endurance: When you take damage, you can use your reaction to reduce it by 1d12 + your CON modifier.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Goliath.name: Storm Giant
features: Storm’s Thunder: When a creature within 60 ft. damages you, you can use your reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to it.
Uses: You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You regain all uses on a Long Rest.

Tiefling.name: Abyssal
features: Abyssal Gift: You have resistance to Poison damage. You also know the Poison Spray cantrip.

Tiefling.name: Chthonic
features: Chthonic Gift: You have resistance to Necrotic damage. You also know the Chill Touch cantrip.

Tiefling.name: Infernal
features: Infernal Gift: You have resistance to Fire damage. You also know the Fire Bolt cantrip.
